description_long: This is a circular chandelier-style sconce featuring a thick wooden ring as its main structure, suspended by three robust black metal chains converging at a central mounting point. Six cylindrical light fixtures are evenly spaced around the wooden ring, each encased in a translucent glass or plastic cover with a visible LED-style bulb inside. The wood has a rustic, weathered appearance with visible grain and darkened patches, while the metal elements are matte black and industrial in style. The fixture's design is both functional and decorative, blending raw materials for a vintage yet urban look. The chains and metal brackets provide structural support and visual contrast to the warm wood. This sconce would be suitable for mounting on ceilings in urban lofts, restaurants, or outdoor covered walkways.
description: A rustic circular chandelier sconce with a wooden ring, six glass-covered LED bulbs, and black metal chains for ceiling suspension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular wooden ring, all six light fixtures, and the converging chains.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the wooden ring and the staggered arrangement of the bulbs.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the metal bracket and the alignment of the bulbs around the ring.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, emphasizing the chain attachment and the texture of the wood.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a rustic industrial design, combining weathered wood, matte black metal, and simple cylindrical glass covers for a vintage yet urban aesthetic.
